mapper.insert: insert into tbl_community_member (community_id, member_id, member_role) values (#{communityId}, #{memberId}, #{memberRole}::community_member_role)
mapper.delete: delete from tbl_community_member where community_id = #{communityId} and member_id = #{memberId}
mapper.select: select cm.community_id, cm.member_id, cm.member_role, cm.joined_at, m.member_nickname, m.member_handle, (select f.file_path from tbl_member_profile_file mpf join tbl_file f on mpf.id = f.id where mpf.member_id = m.id and mpf.profile_image_type = 'profile' limit 1) as member_profile_file_path from tbl_community_member cm join tbl_member m on cm.member_id = m.id where cm.community_id = #{communityId} and cm.member_id = #{memberId}

select cm.community_id, cm.member_id, cm.member_role, cm.joined_at, m.member_nickname, m.member_handle, (select f.file_path from tbl_member_profile_file mpf join tbl_file f on mpf.id = f.id where mpf.member_id = m.id and mpf.profile_image_type = 'profile' limit 1) as member_profile_file_path from tbl_community_member cm join tbl_member m on cm.member_id = m.id where cm.community_id = #{communityId} order by cm.joined_at asc limit #{criteria.count} offset #{criteria.offset}
select count(*) from tbl_community_member where community_id = #{communityId}
